title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
summary: xAI has trained Grok 5, a 1.5 trillion-parameter model reportedly trained on developer workflow data and aimed at AI-assisted coding. The model is being positioned to compete with OpenAI, Google, and Claude through Grok Build, a coding agent with terminal-based capabilities.
